subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team.

We’d be happy to set up a short introductory call next week. Here are some time windows that could work on our side:
- April 21, 2026 between 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- April 22, 2026 between 14:00–16:00
- April 23, 2026 between 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which of these slots works best for you, or feel free to suggest an alternative if none are convenient.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for specific leaders, we’re not able to share internal contact information. For public contact channels and leadership information, please refer to the contact and leadership pages on our public website.

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Team]
